anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown maps axiom instance refinement to std_microcosm_axiom, the axiom doctrine kind, and doctrine fact-claim audit because axiom edits must tighten computed support and authority boundaries rather than launder projection claims.

This markdown maps axiom instance refinement to std_microcosm_axiom, the axiom doctrine kind, and doctrine fact-claim audit because axiom edits must tighten computed support and authority boundaries rather than launder projection claims.
Skill source mapping names this concept as an applied doctrine boundary.
Skill source mapping names this mechanism as an operational dependency.

skill_payload.mapping_basis: This markdown maps axiom instance refinement to std_microcosm_axiom, the axiom doctrine kind, and doctrine fact-claim audit because axiom edits must tighten computed support and authority boundaries rather than launder projection claims.

title: Microcosm Axiom Refine Instance
triggers: A governed axiom has stale routing parity, incomplete support calculus exposure, unclear witness gaps, or a weak authority boundary.
The refinement can be made from source routing or support-contract evidence without changing the whole axiom standard.
workflow: Inspect the axiom JSON, routing registry row, principle obligations, anti-principle guards, support contract, generated health, and validators before mutation.
Change source authority or validator behavior only where the evidence narrows or strengthens the computed claim ceiling.
Regenerate through the builder and leave any unsupported obligation as typed residual pressure.
